Fuzhou & 2026 SCP disclosure, lines 1055-1059;1167-1170;1218-1220 & Prospectus states that the company does not undertake government financing functions and that new debt after January 1 2015 is not local government debt. & Formal no-government-financing language coexists with a major reorganization of public-project finance.
